title: Adversarial Attacks on AI-Powered Intrusion Detection Systems
journal: IEEE Symposium on Security and Privacy
abstract: We demonstrate that state-of-the-art ML-based IDS can be systematically evaded using gradient-based adversarial perturbations, achieving 94% evasion rates against top-performing models.

title: CVE-2024-XXXX: Remote Code Execution in Popular VPN Client
abstract: A stack-based buffer overflow in the authentication module of [Vendor] VPN client allows unauthenticated remote attackers to execute arbitrary code with SYSTEM privileges.

title: LLM Prompt Injection: Taxonomy and Defenses
abstract: A comprehensive taxonomy of prompt injection attack vectors against LLM-integrated applications, with empirical evaluation of current mitigation strategies.
